Source   Edit  

Game Setup Configuration Loader

Loads game setup parameters from game_setup/standard.toml using toml_serialization Defines starting conditions for players (homeworld, fleet, facilities, tech)

Global configuration instanceHelper to reload configuration (for testing)

Imports

../../common/logger, ../../common/types/planets

Types

GameInfoConfig = object
  name*: string
  description*: string
  recommended_players*: int
  estimated_duration*: string
Game metadata Source   Edit   
GameSetupConfig = object
  game_info*: GameInfoConfig
  victory_conditions*: VictoryConditionsConfig
  map*: MapConfig
  starting_resources*: StartingResourcesConfig
  starting_tech*: StartingTechConfig
  starting_fleet*: StartingFleetConfig
  starting_facilities*: StartingFacilitiesConfig
  homeworld*: HomeworldConfig
Complete game setup configuration Source   Edit   
HomeworldConfig = object
  planet_class*: string
  raw_quality*: string
  colony_level*: int
  population_units*: int
Homeworld characteristics Source   Edit   
MapConfig = object
  size*: string
  systems*: int
  jump_lane_density*: string
  starting_distance*: string
Map generation settings Source   Edit   
StartingFacilitiesConfig = object
  spaceports*: int
  shipyards*: int
  starbases*: int
  ground_batteries*: int
  planetary_shields*: int
Homeworld starting facilities Source   Edit   
StartingFleetConfig = object
  etac*: int
  light_cruiser*: int
  destroyer*: int
  scout*: int
Initial fleet composition Source   Edit   
StartingResourcesConfig = object
  treasury*: int
  starting_prestige*: int
  default_tax_rate*: float
Starting economic resources Source   Edit   
StartingTechConfig = object
  economic_level*: int
  science_level*: int
  construction_tech*: int
  weapons_tech*: int
  terraforming_tech*: int
  electronic_intelligence*: int
  cloaking_tech*: int
  shield_tech*: int
  counter_intelligence*: int
  fighter_doctrine*: int
  advanced_carrier_ops*: int
Initial technology levels per gameplay.md:1.2 Source   Edit   
VictoryConditionsConfig = object
  primary_condition*: string
  secondary_condition*: string
  prestige_threshold*: int
Victory conditions Source   Edit  

Vars

globalGameSetupConfig = loadGameSetupConfig("game_setup/standard.toml")
Source   Edit  

Procs

proc loadGameSetupConfig(configPath: string = "game_setup/standard.toml"): GameSetupConfig {.
    ...raises: [IOError, SerializationError, TomlError],
    tags: [ReadDirEffect, ReadIOEffect, RootEffect, TimeEffect, WriteIOEffect],
    forbids: [].}
Load game setup configuration from TOML file Uses toml_serialization for type-safe parsing Source   Edit   
proc parsePlanetClass(className: string): PlanetClass {....raises: [ValueError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Parse planet class string from config Source   Edit   
proc parseResourceRating(ratingName: string): ResourceRating {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Parse resource rating string from config Source   Edit   
proc reloadGameSetupConfig() {....raises: [IOError, SerializationError, TomlError], tags: [
    ReadDirEffect, ReadIOEffect, RootEffect, TimeEffect, WriteIOEffect],
                               forbids: [].}
Reload configuration from file Source   Edit
